name: pepperize-cdk-ses-smtp-credentials

metadata.name: pepperize.cdk-ses-smtp-credentials
metadata.summary: Generate SES smtp credentials for a given user and store the credentials in a SecretsManager Secret.

modules.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials

class_variables.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.Credentials.USERNAME
documentation: The key of the username stored in the secretsmanager key/value json.

class_variables.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.Credentials.PASSWORD
documentation: The key of the password stored in the secretsmanager key/value json.

classes.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentials

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentials.__init__
documentation:
---
param id: '-'
param password_secret_key: Optional, the key name to use in the secret to write the
  password to (defaults to Credentials.PASSWORD).
param scope: '-'
param secret: Optional, an SecretsManager secret to write the AWS SES Smtp credentials
  to.
param user: The user for which to create an AWS Access Key and to generate the smtp
  password. If omitted a user will be created.
param user_name: Optional, a username to create a new user if no existing user is
  given.
param user_name_secret_key: Optional, the key name to use in the secret to write the
  username to (defaults to Credentials.USERNAME).
---

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentials.secret
pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentialsProps.__init__
documentation:
---
param password_secret_key: Optional, the key name to use in the secret to write the
  password to (defaults to Credentials.PASSWORD).
param secret: Optional, an SecretsManager secret to write the AWS SES Smtp credentials
  to.
param user: The user for which to create an AWS Access Key and to generate the smtp
  password. If omitted a user will be created.
param user_name: Optional, a username to create a new user if no existing user is
  given.
param user_name_secret_key: Optional, the key name to use in the secret to write the
  username to (defaults to Credentials.USERNAME).
---

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentialsProps.password_secret_key
documentation: Optional, the key name to use in the secret to write the password to (defaults to Credentials.PASSWORD).

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentialsProps.secret
documentation: Optional, an SecretsManager secret to write the AWS SES Smtp credentials to.

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentialsProps.user
documentation:
The user for which to create an AWS Access Key and to generate the smtp password.

If omitted a user will be created.

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentialsProps.user_name
documentation: Optional, a username to create a new user if no existing user is given.

methods.name: pepperize_cdk_ses_smtp_credentials.SesSmtpCredentialsProps.user_name_secret_key
documentation: Optional, the key name to use in the secret to write the username to (defaults to Credentials.USERNAME).
